ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  UFLEX Limited has appointed Mr. Arun Kumar Sharma as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel, effective July 10, 2026. Mr. Sharma brings over 35 years of experience as a Chartered Accountant, including prior CFO roles at the Jubilant Group, and will also be authorized to determine the materiality of events for stock exchange disclosures, signifying a reinforcement of the company's financial leadership and governance. No red flags or adverse material impacts are indicated by this routine, yet significant, personnel change.
